title: Launch site includes actual viewer demo video
summary: The launch site now includes an actual wide demo recording of the hosted Kage viewer at docs/assets/kage viewer demo.mp4, with poster docs/assets/kage viewer demo poster.png. The recording is generated by scripts/render
body:
The launch site now includes an actual wide demo recording of the hosted Kage viewer at docs/assets/kage-viewer-demo.mp4, with poster docs/assets/kage-viewer-demo-poster.png. The recording is generated by scripts/render-viewer-demo.mjs using the deployed GitHub Pages viewer, Chrome headless, puppeteer-core, and ffmpeg from /tmp/kage-video-tools.
Evidence: docs/index.html embeds the MP4 in the Graphs section; README references the same demo video below the launch GIF.
